name: a9_naive_ts_not_unparseable
description: F-07 regression — a well-formed agent report whose ts_wall is a VALID but tz-naive ISO string (the shape the demo/replay corpora use) must NOT be mislabeled 'unparseable_ts_wall' when compared against a tz-aware now. With no anomalies it stays 'validated'; the naive/aware mismatch is aligned before the far-future check rather than raising TypeError.
